description_long: This bench is constructed from thick, solid wooden planks, giving it a rustic and natural appearance. The seat is a single, elongated wooden slab with visible grain and weathering, suggesting outdoor use. It is supported by two robust cylindrical wooden legs, each made from a cut log, positioned at either end for stability. The bench lacks both a backrest and armrests, emphasizing a minimalist, utilitarian design. The wood appears untreated or only lightly finished, with a rough, matte surface texture. This type of bench is commonly found in parks, gardens, or other outdoor public spaces.
description: A rustic, backless wooden bench with thick log legs and a weathered, matte finish, suitable for outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bench, the flat seat, and both cylindrical wooden legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat plank and the round profile of one log leg.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the seat's length and both supporting legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the seat's thickness and the cylindrical shape of the leg.
attribute_leg_design: two thick cylindrical wooden log legs
